fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Register the mcp() proxy tool and any configured direct tools.

fields.label: Tool name prefix
fields.description: How direct-tool names are disambiguated across servers.

fields.label: Default idle timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Default idle-disconnect timeout for lazy-lifecycle servers when a server doesn't set its own.

fields.label: Auto-approve elicitation
fields.description: Auto-approve MCP server user-input requests when no interactive UI is available (headless sessions). When off, requests are auto-declined headless.

fields.label: Auto-approve sampling
fields.description: Allow MCP servers to request model completions through the active session's LLM without prompting.
